jobs.title: Customer Service OTC UK Markets (Brussels based)
jobs.reason: Job is in English, no experience required, and fits accessible customer service role.
jobs.details:
Role: Manage order-to-cash process for UK market
Main tasks: Customer inquiries, order fulfilment, coordination with sales/logistics/finance
Contract: Permanent, full-time, day work
Schedule: Start ASAP
Language: English required; additional languages a plus
Pay: Competitive monthly salary (not specified)
jobs.why_good:
Job is in English, matching candidate's professional language
No specific experience required, open to early-career
Customer service role accessible with transferable skills from warehouse/logistics
SAP mentioned but not mandatory; candidate can learn
Brussels location is commutable from Zwijndrecht

jobs.title: Administrative Project Assistant
jobs.reason: Job is in English, requires basic Dutch (A2), no experience needed, and is administrative support.
jobs.details:
Role: Administrative Project Assistant supporting document control
Tasks: Check documents, manage document flow, act as point of contact
Contract: Interim with option for permanent, full-time, day work
Language: English (fluent), Dutch (basic) - candidate meets both
Pay: €2500-3700 gross/month
jobs.why_good:
Job is in English with basic Dutch only (candidate has A2)
No experience required - candidate's admin/logistics experience is relevant
Location near Zwijndrecht, easy commute
Good salary range for early-career role
Opportunity to gain project admin experience in a maritime company

jobs.title: Customer Service Representative
jobs.reason: Job requires fluent Dutch and English; candidate has only A2 Dutch, so fails language requirement.
jobs.details:
Role: Customer Service Representative
Manage customer orders from A to Z
Interim with option for permanent contract
Full-time, day work
Languages: Dutch (medium) and English (medium); French is an asset
No experience required
jobs.why_bad:
Requires fluent Dutch (medium level)
Candidate has only A2 Dutch
No French knowledge
No customer service experience

jobs.title: Customer Service Representative
jobs.reason: Customer service role requiring English, limited experience, no strict Dutch/French requirement.
jobs.details:
Role: Customer Service Representative
Tasks: order life cycle, customer inquiries, reporting
Contract: interim with option for permanent, full-time, day work
Schedule: hybrid (3 days onsite after training)
Language: English (very good)
Pay: meal vouchers €8/day, eco vouchers €250/year, laptop
jobs.why_good:
Role is in English, no Dutch/French required
Limited experience (<2 years) accepted
Customer service aligns with candidate's communication skills
Hybrid work possible
No seniority or specialist degree required

jobs.title: Customer Service Representative
jobs.reason: Customer service role in English, no strict experience or language barriers.
jobs.details:
Role: Customer service for order life cycle
Tasks: Handle customer inquiries, order entry, logistics coordination
Contract: Interim with option for permanent, full-time, day work
Schedule: Hybrid after training, 39h/week
Language: English required (very good)
Pay: Meal vouchers €8/day, eco vouchers €250/year, laptop
jobs.why_good:
Role is in English, matching candidate's professional English
Customer service is an accessible entry-level role
No strict degree requirement; secondary education accepted
Candidate has logistics experience from warehouse work
Hybrid work possible after training

jobs.title: Manual worker
jobs.reason: Manual warehouse job with no experience required, English accepted, and candidate has relevant logistics experience.
jobs.details:
Role: warehouse operator (packing, loading/unloading, sorting)
Contract: interim with option for permanent, full-time, 2-shift system
Schedule: Monday-Friday, no weekends
Language: English (good) required
Pay: 6.5 euro meal vouchers/day
jobs.why_good:
Candidate has warehouse & logistics experience at Katoen Natie
No experience required, only motivation
English is sufficient (candidate is professional in English)
Full-time, stable hours, no weekends
Training provided on the floor
